summary: DNS Health Checker feature fully tested - Backend 100% (18/18 tests passed), Frontend 100% (all 4 tabs working). All 7 API endpoints verified, UI navigation and interactions working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend service properly excludes MongoDB _id from all responses
All 9 DNS record types (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME, SOA, SRV, CAA) supported
Health check includes TCP port checks for HTTP (80) and HTTPS (443)
Health scoring algorithm correctly weights pass/warn/fail/info statuses
Frontend properly uses data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
DNS Health Checker link correctly placed in Tools dropdown navigation
Real DNS lookups using dnspython library - no mocked APIs
seed_data_creation: Created test monitors and lookup history via pytest and Playwright tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: DNS Health Checker fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: POST /api/dns/lookup, GET /api/dns/health/{domain}, GET /api/dns/history, POST/GET/DELETE /api/dns/monitors, POST /api/dns/monitors/{id}/refresh. Frontend: DNSHealthPage.jsx with 4 tabs (DNS Lookup, Health Check, Monitors, History). Navigation via Tools dropdown. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Uses real dnspython library for DNS resolution.

backend_endpoints.POST /api/dns/lookup: PASS - Basic lookup, record type filtering, all 9 types, empty domain validation, non-existent domain handling
backend_endpoints.GET /api/dns/health/{domain}: PASS - Returns health_score (0-100), 9 checks (a_record, ipv6, nameservers, mail, spf, dmarc, soa, http, https)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/dns/history: PASS - Returns lookup history with pagination (limit param)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/dns/monitors: PASS - Add domain to monitoring, 409 for duplicates
backend_endpoints.POST /api/dns/monitors/{id}/refresh: PASS - Refresh health check, 404 for non-existent
backend_endpoints.Authentication: PASS - All endpoints require Bearer token

frontend_components.DNS Health page at /dns-health: PASS - Page loads with header and description
frontend_components.Navigation link in Tools dropdown: PASS - DNS Health Checker link visible and clickable
frontend_components.4 tabs (DNS Lookup, Health Check, Monito: PASS - All tabs visible and switchable
frontend_components.DNS Lookup tab - record type selector: PASS - 9 type buttons (A, AAAA, MX, NS, TXT, CNAME, SOA, SRV, CAA)
frontend_components.DNS Lookup tab - results cards: PASS - Shows record type, count, values, TTL, response time
frontend_components.Monitors tab - add domain input: PASS - Input and Add button working
frontend_components.Monitors tab - monitor cards: PASS - Shows domain, last checked, health score bar, check badges
frontend_components.History tab - lookup table: PASS - Shows domain, types, results, date columns

design_verification.Text contrast: PASS - Good contrast on all text elements
design_verification.Responsive layout: PASS - Cards grid adapts to screen size

mocked_data_note: No mocked APIs - all DNS lookups use real dnspython library
